meta.title: TiDB Engineering Playbooks
meta.description: Step-by-step guides to solve common database problems for production engineers using TiDB.

props.headline: Stop firefighting. Start building.
props.subheadline: Step-by-step guides for the database problems

items.title: Silence the noisy neighbor in multi-tenant MySQL
items.description: Detect tenant floods fast, contain blast radius without downtime, and harden your cluster so the next burst is a non-event — using TiDB resource groups, Placement Rules, and RBAC.

items.title: Embed a vector DB and build RAG faster with TiDB
items.description: Skip the separate vector store. Use TiDB's native vector indexing to build retrieval-augmented generation pipelines that query embeddings alongside your relational data — in a single MySQL-compatible database.

items.title: Escape MySQL sharding pain and scale fast
items.description: Break free from manual shards. See how TiDB's distributed SQL eliminates cross-shard joins, re-sharding downtime, and the routing layer you wrote and now dread touching.

props.title: Try TiDB on your own data

props.content:
## Coming Soon

More playbooks in the pipeline — covering the full lifecycle from idea to production-ready AI app.

### MySQL migration & operations

#### Zero-downtime MySQL migration

Move from MySQL to TiDB using DM with a live cutover — no maintenance window required. Covers schema compatibility, binlog replication, and the final switchover checklist.

*Coming soon*

### AI development for everyone

#### The complete tech stack for vibe coding in 2026: what you actually need

A no-fluff guide to the tools, databases, and deployment targets that matter in 2026 for developers building with AI. Covers what to pick, what to skip, and how TiDB fits in.

*Coming soon*

#### From idea to live app in a weekend: a step-by-step AI development playbook

You have an idea on Friday night. This playbook walks you through scoping, scaffolding, wiring up a database, and shipping by Sunday — using AI-assisted development workflows throughout.

*Coming soon*

#### How to turn a ChatGPT prompt into a production-ready agent

Prompting is the easy part. This playbook covers what happens next: persisting agent state, handling retries and failures, connecting to a real database, and deploying something that won't break under load.

*Coming soon*

#### The vibe coder's workflow: idea → agent → database → deploy

A practical, repeatable workflow for builders who move fast. Covers scoping an agent, choosing the right data layer, and getting to a deployed URL without drowning in infrastructure.

*Coming soon*

#### Building your first AI app without a CS degree: a real walkthrough

A genuine beginner-friendly walkthrough — no assumed knowledge, no hand-waving. Goes from a blank screen to a working AI-powered app, with real code and real explanations at every step.

*Coming soon*
